title: Tasty Thick Brazilian Tofu Skewers
description: A quick and easy Brazilian dish featuring marinated tofu skewers in a rich and savory sauce, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This ovo-vegetarian friendly recipe is made with miso marinate and has a fatty and glassy-jelly texture.

ingredients.name: extra firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into 1 inch cubes

instructions: Preheat the grill to medium high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together miso paste, soy sauce, olive oil, garlic, and ginger to make the marinade.
Add the tofu cubes to the marinade and toss to coat.
Thread the marinated tofu cubes onto skewers.
Grill the skewers for 10 minutes, turning occasionally.
In a small saucepan, combine coconut milk, salt, and black pepper.
Bring the sauce to a simmer over medium heat and cook for 5 minutes.
Serve the grilled tofu skewers with the sauce spooned over the top.
